case_title: XUE FENG WEN VS. KARLA VANNESSA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-13-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEN, XUE FENG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, KARLA VANNESSA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WEN, XUE FENG AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, KARLA VANNESSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINU ORDER AMILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
